message:
feat: Phase 4 - KV Cache Snapshots for instant boot

Add "compiled intelligence" capability - bake system prompts into binary
state files that load instantly via direct memory restoration.

- llama.zig: Add state serialization APIs (getState/setState, getSeqState/setSeqState)
- snapshot.zig: New module with SnapshotHeader format, create/load/info functions
- main.zig: Add CLI commands (snapshot, restore, snapshot-info)
- scheduler.zig: Add per-cell snapshot methods (saveCellSnapshot, loadCellSnapshot, cloneCellState)

Usage:
  zell snapshot model.gguf "You are a Zig expert." agent.bin
  zell restore model.gguf agent.bin "What is comptime?"
  zell snapshot-info agent.bin
